GET /twitter/community/info.heading_zh: 按 ID 获取社区信息 GET /twitter/community/info
GET /twitter/community/info.desc_en: Retrieve detailed information about a single community by its ID, including its profile, membership counts, topic, rules, and the requester's role.
GET /twitter/community/info.description_zh: 按社区 ID 获取单个社区的详细信息，包含其资料、成员数量、主题、规则以及请求方在该社区中的角色。

GET /twitter/community/members.desc_en: Retrieve the members of a community, returned one page at a time with cursor pagination.
GET /twitter/community/members.description_zh: 获取某社区的成员，按页返回并通过游标翻页。

GET /twitter/community/moderators.desc_en: Retrieve the moderators of a community, returned one page at a time with cursor pagination.
GET /twitter/community/moderators.description_zh: 获取某社区的版主，按页返回并通过游标翻页。

GET /twitter/community/tweets.desc_en: Retrieve tweets posted within a community, returned one page at a time with cursor pagination.
GET /twitter/community/tweets.description_zh: 获取某社区内发布的推文，按页返回并通过游标翻页。

GET /twitter/community/get_tweets_from_a.heading_zh: 搜索全部社区的推文 GET /twitter/community/get_tweets_from_all_community
GET /twitter/community/get_tweets_from_a.desc_en: Search tweets across all communities using a query string, choosing between the most recent matches or the top-ranked ones, with cursor pagination.
GET /twitter/community/get_tweets_from_a.description_zh: 使用查询字符串跨全部社区搜索推文，可在最新匹配与热门排序结果之间选择，并通过游标翻页。

community_id.desc_en: Identifier of the community whose information you want to retrieve.
community_id.title_zh: 要获取信息的社区标识。

description.title_zh: 介绍该社区的描述文字。

question.desc_en: Membership question prospective members are asked when joining.
question.title_zh: 新成员加入时被问及的入会问题。

member_count.desc_en: Total number of members in the community.

moderator_count.desc_en: Total number of moderators in the community.

created_at.desc_en: Timestamp when the community was created.

join_policy.desc_en: Policy governing how new members may join the community.
join_policy.title_zh: 规定新成员如何加入该社区的策略。

invites_policy.desc_en: Policy governing who may invite others to the community.
invites_policy.title_zh: 规定谁可以邀请他人加入该社区的策略。

is_nsfw.desc_en: Whether the community is marked as not safe for work.
is_nsfw.title_zh: 该社区是否被标记为不适宜在工作场合浏览（NSFW）。

is_pinned.desc_en: Whether the community is pinned by the requester.
is_pinned.title_zh: 该社区是否被请求方置顶。

role.desc_en: The requester's role within the community, such as member, moderator, or admin.
role.title_zh: 请求方在该社区中的角色，如成员、版主或管理员。

primary_topic.name.desc_en: Display name of the primary topic.

banner_url.desc_en: Web link to the community's banner image.
banner_url.title_zh: 社区横幅图片的网页链接。

search_tags.desc_en: Tags associated with the community to aid discovery in search.
search_tags.title_zh: 与该社区关联、便于在搜索中被发现的标签。

rules.desc_en: Rules that members of the community must follow.
rules.title_zh: 社区成员需遵守的规则。

rules.name.desc_en: Short name or title of the rule.
rules.name.title_zh: 规则的简短名称或标题。

rules.description.title_zh: 解释该规则的详细文字。

creator.desc_en: Profile of the user who created the community.
creator.title_zh: 创建该社区的用户资料。

creator.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
creator.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

creator.userName.desc_en: The user's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
creator.userName.title_zh: 用户的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

creator.url.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile page.
creator.url.title_zh: 用户资料页的网页链接。

creator.name.desc_en: The user's display name shown on the profile.
creator.name.title_zh: 用户在资料页展示的昵称。

creator.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the user holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
creator.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 用户是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

creator.verifiedType.desc_en: The user's verification category, such as a business or government account.
creator.verifiedType.title_zh: 用户的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

creator.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's avatar image.
creator.profilePicture.title_zh: 用户头像图片的网页链接。

creator.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile banner image.
creator.coverPicture.title_zh: 用户资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

creator.description.title_zh: 用户资料页的个人简介文字。

creator.location.desc_en: Free-text location the user lists on their profile.
creator.location.title_zh: 用户在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

creator.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the user.

creator.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the user follows.

creator.canDm.desc_en: Whether the user currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
creator.canDm.title_zh: 该用户当前是否接受请求方的私信。

creator.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the user's account was created.

creator.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the user has liked.

creator.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the user has created custom timelines.
creator.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 用户是否创建过自定义时间线。

creator.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the user participates in the Twitter translation program.
creator.isTranslator.title_zh: 用户是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

creator.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the user has posted.
creator.mediaCount.title_zh: 用户发布过的媒体条目数。

creator.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the user has posted.
creator.statusesCount.title_zh: 用户发布过的推文总数。

creator.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the user's account is withheld for legal reasons.
creator.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽该用户账号的国家／地区代码列表。

creator.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the user's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
creator.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 用户的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

creator.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the user has pinned to the top of their profile.
creator.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 用户置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

creator.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
creator.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

creator.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
creator.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

creator.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the user's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
creator.unavailable.title_zh: 用户账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

creator.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
creator.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

creator.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
creator.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

creator.profile_bio.desc_en: The user's profile bio along with the entities parsed from it.
creator.profile_bio.title_zh: 用户的资料简介及从中解析出的实体。

creator.profile_bio.description.desc_en: The raw bio text shown on the user's profile.
creator.profile_bio.description.title_zh: 用户资料页展示的原始简介文字。

creator.profile_bio.entities.desc_en: Structured entities parsed from the bio, covering both the bio text and the profile website field.
creator.profile_bio.entities.title_zh: 从简介中解析出的结构化实体，涵盖简介文字与资料页网址字段。

creator.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Entities parsed from the bio description text.
creator.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 从简介描述文字中解析出的实体。

creator.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Links found in the bio description text.
creator.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 简介描述文字中出现的链接。

creator.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the link as displayed in the bio.
creator.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 简介中显示的链接的短化、易读形式。

creator.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.
creator.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 显示链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

creator.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the bio text.
creator.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 该链接在简介文字中的起止字符位置。

creator.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the bio text.
creator.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 简介文字中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

creator.profile_bio.entities.url.desc_en: Entities parsed from the profile website field.
creator.profile_bio.entities.url.title_zh: 从资料页网址字段中解析出的实体。

creator.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.desc_en: Links found in the profile website field.
creator.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.title_zh: 资料页网址字段中出现的链接。

creator.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.di.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the website link as displayed.
creator.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.di.title_zh: 显示的网址链接的短化、易读形式。

creator.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ex.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed website link resolves to.
creator.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ex.title_zh: 显示的网址链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

creator.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.in.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the website field.
creator.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.in.title_zh: 该链接在网址字段中的起止字符位置。

creator.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ur.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the website field.
creator.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ur.title_zh: 网址字段中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

members_preview.desc_en: A small preview sample of community members.
members_preview.title_zh: 社区成员的小幅预览样本。

community_id.desc_en: Identifier of the community whose members you want to list.
community_id.title_zh: 要列出其成员的社区标识。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

members.profile_bio.entities.title_zh: 从简介中解析出的结构化实体，涵盖简介文字与资料页网址字段。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Entities parsed from the bio description text.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 从简介描述文字中解析出的实体。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Links found in the bio description text.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 简介描述文字中出现的链接。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the link as displayed in the bio.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 简介中显示的链接的短化、易读形式。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 显示链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the bio text.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 该链接在简介文字中的起止字符位置。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the bio text.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 简介文字中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.desc_en: Entities parsed from the profile website field.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.title_zh: 从资料页网址字段中解析出的实体。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.desc_en: Links found in the profile website field.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.title_zh: 资料页网址字段中出现的链接。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.di.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the website link as displayed.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.di.title_zh: 显示的网址链接的短化、易读形式。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ex.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed website link resolves to.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ex.title_zh: 显示的网址链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.in.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the website field.

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ur.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the website field.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ur.title_zh: 网址字段中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

community_id.desc_en: Identifier of the community whose moderators you want to list.
community_id.title_zh: 要列出其版主的社区标识。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

members.desc_en: Community moderators returned for this page.

members.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
members.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

members.userName.desc_en: The user's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
members.userName.title_zh: 用户的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

members.url.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile page.
members.url.title_zh: 用户资料页的网页链接。

members.name.desc_en: The user's display name shown on the profile.
members.name.title_zh: 用户在资料页展示的昵称。

members.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the user holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
members.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 用户是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

members.verifiedType.desc_en: The user's verification category, such as a business or government account.
members.verifiedType.title_zh: 用户的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

members.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's avatar image.
members.profilePicture.title_zh: 用户头像图片的网页链接。

members.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile banner image.
members.coverPicture.title_zh: 用户资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

members.description.title_zh: 用户资料页的个人简介文字。

members.location.desc_en: Free-text location the user lists on their profile.
members.location.title_zh: 用户在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

members.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the user.

members.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the user follows.

members.canDm.desc_en: Whether the user currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
members.canDm.title_zh: 该用户当前是否接受请求方的私信。

members.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the user's account was created.

members.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the user has liked.

members.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the user has created custom timelines.
members.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 用户是否创建过自定义时间线。

members.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the user participates in the Twitter translation program.
members.isTranslator.title_zh: 用户是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

members.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the user has posted.
members.mediaCount.title_zh: 用户发布过的媒体条目数。

members.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the user has posted.
members.statusesCount.title_zh: 用户发布过的推文总数。

members.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the user's account is withheld for legal reasons.
members.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽该用户账号的国家／地区代码列表。

members.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the user's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
members.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 用户的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

members.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the user has pinned to the top of their profile.
members.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 用户置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

members.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
members.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

members.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
members.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

members.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the user's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
members.unavailable.title_zh: 用户账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

members.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
members.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

members.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
members.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

members.profile_bio.desc_en: The user's profile bio along with the entities parsed from it.
members.profile_bio.title_zh: 用户的资料简介及从中解析出的实体。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 简介中显示的链接的短化、易读形式。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 显示链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the bio text.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 该链接在简介文字中的起止字符位置。

members.profile_bio.entities.description.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the bio text.
members.profile_bio.entities.description.title_zh: 简介文字中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.desc_en: Entities parsed from the profile website field.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.title_zh: 从资料页网址字段中解析出的实体。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.desc_en: Links found in the profile website field.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.title_zh: 资料页网址字段中出现的链接。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.di.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the website link as displayed.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.di.title_zh: 显示的网址链接的短化、易读形式。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ex.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed website link resolves to.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ex.title_zh: 显示的网址链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.in.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the website field.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.in.title_zh: 该链接在网址字段中的起止字符位置。

members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ur.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the website field.
members.profile_bio.entities.url.urls.ur.title_zh: 网址字段中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

community_id.desc_en: Identifier of the community whose tweets you want to list.
community_id.title_zh: 要列出其推文的社区标识。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

tweets.desc_en: Tweets posted in the community, returned for this page.
tweets.title_zh: 本页返回的该社区内发布的推文。

tweets.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a tweet.
tweets.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为推文。

tweets.url.desc_en: Web link to the tweet on X/Twitter.
tweets.url.title_zh: 推文在 X/Twitter 上的网页链接。

tweets.text.desc_en: Full text content of the tweet.

tweets.source.desc_en: Name of the client application used to post the tweet.
tweets.source.title_zh: 发布该推文所用的客户端应用名称。

tweets.retweetCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been retweeted.

tweets.replyCount.desc_en: Number of replies to the tweet.

tweets.likeCount.desc_en: Number of likes on the tweet.

tweets.quoteCount.desc_en: Number of quote tweets referencing this tweet.
tweets.quoteCount.title_zh: 引用该推文的引用推文数。

tweets.viewCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been viewed.

tweets.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the tweet was created.

tweets.lang.desc_en: Detected language of the tweet text, as a language code.
tweets.lang.title_zh: 推文正文被识别出的语言，以语言代码表示。

tweets.bookmarkCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been bookmarked.

tweets.isReply.desc_en: Whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet.
tweets.isReply.title_zh: 该推文是否为对另一条推文的回复。

tweets.inReplyToId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet this one directly replies to; present only when isReply is true.
tweets.inReplyToId.title_zh: 该推文直接回复的目标推文标识；仅当 isReply 为真时存在。

tweets.conversationId.desc_en: Identifier of the root tweet that started the conversation thread this tweet belongs to.
tweets.conversationId.title_zh: 该推文所属对话线程的起始推文标识。

tweets.displayTextRange.desc_en: Start and end character offsets marking the displayable portion of the tweet text.
tweets.displayTextRange.title_zh: 标记推文正文中可显示部分的起止字符位置。

tweets.inReplyToUserId.desc_en: Identifier of the user being replied to.

tweets.inReplyToUsername.desc_en: Username of the user being replied to.

tweets.author.desc_en: Profile of the user who posted the tweet.
tweets.author.title_zh: 发布该推文的用户资料。

tweets.author.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
tweets.author.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

tweets.author.userName.desc_en: The author's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
tweets.author.userName.title_zh: 作者的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

tweets.author.url.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile page.

tweets.author.name.desc_en: The author's display name shown on the profile.
tweets.author.name.title_zh: 作者在资料页展示的昵称。

tweets.author.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the author holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
tweets.author.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 作者是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

tweets.author.verifiedType.desc_en: The author's verification category, such as a business or government account.
tweets.author.verifiedType.title_zh: 作者的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

tweets.author.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's avatar image.

tweets.author.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile banner image.
tweets.author.coverPicture.title_zh: 作者资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

tweets.author.description.title_zh: 作者资料页的个人简介文字。

tweets.author.location.desc_en: Free-text location the author lists on their profile.
tweets.author.location.title_zh: 作者在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

tweets.author.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the author.

tweets.author.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the author follows.

tweets.author.canDm.desc_en: Whether the author currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
tweets.author.canDm.title_zh: 作者当前是否接受请求方的私信。

tweets.author.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the author's account was created.

tweets.author.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the author has liked.

tweets.author.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the author has created custom timelines.
tweets.author.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 作者是否创建过自定义时间线。

tweets.author.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the author participates in the Twitter translation program.
tweets.author.isTranslator.title_zh: 作者是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

tweets.author.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the author has posted.
tweets.author.mediaCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的媒体条目数。

tweets.author.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the author has posted.
tweets.author.statusesCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的推文总数。

tweets.author.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the author's account is withheld for legal reasons.
tweets.author.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽作者账号的国家／地区代码列表。

tweets.author.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the author's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
tweets.author.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 作者的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

tweets.author.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the author has pinned to the top of their profile.
tweets.author.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 作者置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

tweets.author.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
tweets.author.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

tweets.author.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
tweets.author.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

tweets.author.unavailable.title_zh: 作者账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

tweets.entities.desc_en: Structured entities parsed from the tweet text, such as hashtags, links, and user mentions.
tweets.entities.title_zh: 从推文正文解析出的结构化实体，如话题标签、链接与用户提及。

tweets.entities.hashtags.desc_en: Hashtags found in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.hashtags.title_zh: 推文正文中出现的话题标签。

tweets.entities.hashtags.text.title_zh: 话题标签的文字，不含开头的 # 号。

tweets.entities.urls.expanded_url.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.
tweets.entities.urls.expanded_url.title_zh: 显示链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

tweets.entities.urls.indices.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.indices.title_zh: 该链接在推文正文中的起止字符位置。

tweets.entities.urls.url.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.url.title_zh: 推文正文中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

tweets.entities.user_mentions.desc_en: Users mentioned in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.user_mentions.title_zh: 推文正文中提及的用户。

tweets.entities.user_mentions.name.desc_en: Display name of the mentioned user.

tweets.entities.user_mentions.screen_nam.title_zh: 被提及用户的 @ 用户名。

tweets.quoted_tweet.desc_en: The tweet quoted by this tweet, when it is a quote tweet.
tweets.quoted_tweet.title_zh: 当该推文为引用推文时，其所引用的推文。
tweets.quoted_tweet.annotation: 源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。

tweets.retweeted_tweet.desc_en: The original tweet this tweet retweets, when it is a retweet.
tweets.retweeted_tweet.title_zh: 当该推文为转发时，其所转发的原推文。
tweets.retweeted_tweet.annotation: 源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。

tweets.isLimitedReply.desc_en: Whether replies to this tweet are restricted by the author's reply settings.
tweets.isLimitedReply.title_zh: 该推文的回复是否受作者的回复权限设置限制。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

query.desc_en: Search query string, such as a keyword, used to match tweets across all communities.
query.title_zh: 搜索查询字符串（如关键词），用于跨全部社区匹配推文。

queryType.desc_en: Ranking mode of the results: Latest returns the most recent matches, Top returns the most relevant or popular ones.
queryType.title_zh: 结果的排序模式：Latest 返回最新匹配，Top 返回最相关或最热门的结果。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

tweets.desc_en: Tweets matching the search across communities, returned for this page.
tweets.title_zh: 本页返回的跨社区匹配搜索条件的推文。

tweets.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a tweet.
tweets.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为推文。

tweets.url.desc_en: Web link to the tweet on X/Twitter.
tweets.url.title_zh: 推文在 X/Twitter 上的网页链接。

tweets.text.desc_en: Full text content of the tweet.

tweets.source.desc_en: Name of the client application used to post the tweet.
tweets.source.title_zh: 发布该推文所用的客户端应用名称。

tweets.retweetCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been retweeted.

tweets.replyCount.desc_en: Number of replies to the tweet.

tweets.likeCount.desc_en: Number of likes on the tweet.

tweets.quoteCount.desc_en: Number of quote tweets referencing this tweet.
tweets.quoteCount.title_zh: 引用该推文的引用推文数。

tweets.viewCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been viewed.

tweets.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the tweet was created.

tweets.lang.desc_en: Detected language of the tweet text, as a language code.
tweets.lang.title_zh: 推文正文被识别出的语言，以语言代码表示。

tweets.bookmarkCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been bookmarked.

tweets.isReply.desc_en: Whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet.
tweets.isReply.title_zh: 该推文是否为对另一条推文的回复。

tweets.inReplyToId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet this one directly replies to; present only when isReply is true.
tweets.inReplyToId.title_zh: 该推文直接回复的目标推文标识；仅当 isReply 为真时存在。

tweets.conversationId.desc_en: Identifier of the root tweet that started the conversation thread this tweet belongs to.
tweets.conversationId.title_zh: 该推文所属对话线程的起始推文标识。

tweets.displayTextRange.desc_en: Start and end character offsets marking the displayable portion of the tweet text.
tweets.displayTextRange.title_zh: 标记推文正文中可显示部分的起止字符位置。

tweets.inReplyToUserId.desc_en: Identifier of the user being replied to.

tweets.inReplyToUsername.desc_en: Username of the user being replied to.

tweets.author.desc_en: Profile of the user who posted the tweet.
tweets.author.title_zh: 发布该推文的用户资料。

tweets.author.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
tweets.author.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

tweets.author.userName.desc_en: The author's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
tweets.author.userName.title_zh: 作者的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

tweets.author.url.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile page.
tweets.author.url.title_zh: 作者资料页的网页链接。

tweets.author.name.desc_en: The author's display name shown on the profile.
tweets.author.name.title_zh: 作者在资料页展示的昵称。

tweets.author.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the author holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
tweets.author.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 作者是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

tweets.author.verifiedType.desc_en: The author's verification category, such as a business or government account.
tweets.author.verifiedType.title_zh: 作者的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

tweets.author.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's avatar image.
tweets.author.profilePicture.title_zh: 作者头像图片的网页链接。

tweets.author.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile banner image.
tweets.author.coverPicture.title_zh: 作者资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

tweets.author.description.title_zh: 作者资料页的个人简介文字。

tweets.author.location.desc_en: Free-text location the author lists on their profile.
tweets.author.location.title_zh: 作者在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

tweets.author.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the author.

tweets.author.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the author follows.

tweets.author.canDm.desc_en: Whether the author currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
tweets.author.canDm.title_zh: 作者当前是否接受请求方的私信。

tweets.author.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the author's account was created.

tweets.author.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the author has liked.

tweets.author.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the author has created custom timelines.
tweets.author.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 作者是否创建过自定义时间线。

tweets.author.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the author participates in the Twitter translation program.
tweets.author.isTranslator.title_zh: 作者是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

tweets.author.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the author has posted.
tweets.author.mediaCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的媒体条目数。

tweets.author.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the author has posted.
tweets.author.statusesCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的推文总数。

tweets.author.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the author's account is withheld for legal reasons.
tweets.author.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽作者账号的国家／地区代码列表。

tweets.author.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the author's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
tweets.author.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 作者的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

tweets.author.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the author has pinned to the top of their profile.
tweets.author.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 作者置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

tweets.author.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
tweets.author.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

tweets.author.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
tweets.author.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

tweets.author.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the author's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
tweets.author.unavailable.title_zh: 作者账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

tweets.author.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
tweets.author.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

tweets.author.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
tweets.author.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

tweets.author.profile_bio.desc_en: The author's profile bio along with the entities parsed from it.
tweets.author.profile_bio.title_zh: 作者的资料简介及从中解析出的实体。

tweets.author.profile_bio.description.desc_en: The raw bio text shown on the author's profile.
tweets.author.profile_bio.description.title_zh: 作者资料页展示的原始简介文字。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.desc_en: Structured entities parsed from the bio, covering both the bio text and the profile website field.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.title_zh: 从简介中解析出的结构化实体，涵盖简介文字与资料页网址字段。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.desc_en: Entities parsed from the bio description text.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.title_zh: 从简介描述文字中解析出的实体。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.desc_en: Links found in the bio description text.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.title_zh: 简介描述文字中出现的链接。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the link as displayed in the bio.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.title_zh: 简介中显示的链接的短化、易读形式。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.title_zh: 显示链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the bio text.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.title_zh: 该链接在简介文字中的起止字符位置。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the bio text.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.descr.title_zh: 简介文字中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.desc_en: Entities parsed from the profile website field.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.title_zh: 从资料页网址字段中解析出的实体。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.desc_en: Links found in the profile website field.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.title_zh: 资料页网址字段中出现的链接。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the website link as displayed.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.title_zh: 显示的网址链接的短化、易读形式。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed website link resolves to.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.title_zh: 显示的网址链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the website field.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.title_zh: 该链接在网址字段中的起止字符位置。

tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the website field.
tweets.author.profile_bio.entities.url.u.title_zh: 网址字段中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

tweets.entities.desc_en: Structured entities parsed from the tweet text, such as hashtags, links, and user mentions.
tweets.entities.title_zh: 从推文正文解析出的结构化实体，如话题标签、链接与用户提及。

tweets.entities.hashtags.desc_en: Hashtags found in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.hashtags.title_zh: 推文正文中出现的话题标签。

tweets.entities.hashtags.indices.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the hashtag within the tweet text.
tweets.entities.hashtags.indices.title_zh: 该话题标签在推文正文中的起止字符位置。

tweets.entities.hashtags.text.desc_en: The hashtag word, without the leading # sign.
tweets.entities.hashtags.text.title_zh: 话题标签的文字，不含开头的 # 号。

tweets.entities.urls.desc_en: Links found in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.title_zh: 推文正文中出现的链接。

tweets.entities.urls.display_url.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the link as displayed in the tweet.
tweets.entities.urls.display_url.title_zh: 推文中显示的链接的短化、易读形式。

tweets.entities.urls.expanded_url.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.
tweets.entities.urls.expanded_url.title_zh: 显示链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

tweets.entities.urls.indices.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.indices.title_zh: 该链接在推文正文中的起止字符位置。

tweets.entities.urls.url.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.url.title_zh: 推文正文中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

tweets.entities.user_mentions.desc_en: Users mentioned in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.user_mentions.title_zh: 推文正文中提及的用户。

tweets.entities.user_mentions.name.desc_en: Display name of the mentioned user.

tweets.entities.user_mentions.screen_nam.title_zh: 被提及用户的 @ 用户名。

tweets.quoted_tweet.desc_en: The tweet quoted by this tweet, when it is a quote tweet.
tweets.quoted_tweet.title_zh: 当该推文为引用推文时，其所引用的推文。
tweets.quoted_tweet.annotation: 源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。

tweets.retweeted_tweet.desc_en: The original tweet this tweet retweets, when it is a retweet.
tweets.retweeted_tweet.title_zh: 当该推文为转发时，其所转发的原推文。
tweets.retweeted_tweet.annotation: 源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。

tweets.isLimitedReply.desc_en: Whether replies to this tweet are restricted by the author's reply settings.
tweets.isLimitedReply.title_zh: 该推文的回复是否受作者的回复权限设置限制。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。
